title: ENERGY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: OUR JUST FUTURE ENERGY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance for electric, gas, and heating fuel (oil, propane, and wood) when funding is available. Assistance is limited and not guaranteed. 10550 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Electric and gas: Households with very low income and who are customers of Pacific Power (PPL) or NW Natural Gas Heating fuel: Not accepting appointments Hours: Open Monday, April 27, 2026 9am until capacity is reached Email (503) 405-7877 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (503) 405-7877 Energy Assistance Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call and leave a message with first and last name, a working phone number, and utility company name to request an appointment when the line is open -Appointments are scheduled on a first call, first serve basis; no priority status for clients whose service has been disconnected -Capacity is generally reached the same day program opens and can be within 30 minutes or less of opening -The goal is for phone messages to be returned within five business days. Unable to guarantee same day appointments. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Required at intake appointment: -Social Security number -Identification card -Current utility bill -Proof of income (proof of social security income must be a benefit letter for 2026) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ROCKWOOD WATER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUR JUST FUTURE
